ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the conservatory */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the instructor (e.g., trumpet, piano) */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., Trumpet, Flute) */,
  "instrument_family" TEXT /* Family of the instrument (e.g., Brass, Woodwind) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., Acoustic, Electric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_groups" (
  "score_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the score group (e.g., Lyrical Etude, Technical Etude) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the score group */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the score group (e.g., Etude, Scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise */,
  "score_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score group the exercise belongs to */,
  "exercise_name" TEXT /* Name of the exercise */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exercise */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the exercise (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student performing */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used in the performance */,
  "score_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score group for the performance */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise performed */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the performance (in seconds) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the performance (in seconds) */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the performance (in seconds) */,
  "self_assessment" TEXT /* Self-assessment by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercises ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_score_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_group_id") REFERENCES score_groups ("score_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance being assessed */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor doing the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given for the performance */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "recommended_exercises" TEXT /* Recommended exercises for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practice_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practice session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student practicing */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument played during practice */,
  "score_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score group practiced */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise practiced */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the practice session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the practice session (in minutes) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the student about the practice session */,
  "focus_areas" TEXT /* Focus areas for the practice session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practice_sessions_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercises ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practice_sessions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practice_sessions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practice_sessions_score_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_group_id") REFERENCES score_groups ("score_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peer review */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student doing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, instructor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (student or instructor) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment that the feedback is related to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the student about the assessment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance the metric relates to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked (e.g., tempo, dynamics) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercises_score_groups" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise */,
  "score_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id", "score_group_id")
)
